description_long: This internet cafe is a rectangular, single-story structure with pale blue exterior walls and a reddish-brown floor. The interior is organized with four long rows of wooden desks, each equipped with multiple computer stations and chairs, arranged in a grid-like pattern. Large windows line two of the walls, allowing natural light to enter and providing visibility into the workspace. There is a single main entrance door on one side, leading directly into the seating area. The overall design is functional and utilitarian, with a focus on maximizing seating and computer access for patrons. The space is uncluttered, with no visible signage, advertisements, or decorative elements.
description: A rectangular, pale blue internet cafe with rows of computer stations, large windows, and a single entrance. The interior is organized for efficient seating and computer access.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the internet cafe from the back, highlighting the rows of computer stations and the open interior layout.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the side of the building with the main entrance door and three large windows, offering a partial view of the interior desks.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front of the cafe, clearly showing the arrangement of computer stations and seating through the open front wall.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a view from the opposite side, focusing on the windows and the arrangement of desks near the wall.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: Sixteen computer stations are visible, arranged in four rows of four, each with a monitor and chair; stations are clearly visible from both interior and exterior views.
